author: sleepyhauru
description: Read-only OSRS rare impling spawn feeds backed by the RuneLite Impling Finder Oracle ORDS backend.
install_msg: Load it with `[p]load implingfinder`. Configure a feed with `[p]implingset addchannel #dragon-imps dragon lucky`, then enable polling with `[p]implingset enable`.
short: Post recent OSRS rare impling sightings.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild feed settings and recent impling spawn dedupe keys. It does not store user data.
